full_text:
Approximately 1.5 cm tissue piece was mined and dissociated in 20 ml of AdF++ medium containing 400 ul of 50U/ml dispase and 200ul of RNAse free DNAse, according to the protocol.

Final cell pellet was resuspended in 2 ml of AdF++ medium

Cell count 1):

total: 4.12 E6

live: 1.48 E6

viability: 36 %

Size: 7.1 um

Cell count 2):

total: 5.81 E6

live: 1.6 E6

viability: 27.6 %

Size: 7.0 um

Cell count: 4.96 E6 / mL

Total volume: 2 mL

Total cell count: 10 E6

As the ice section diagnosis was unclear we did not proceed further. Final cell pellet was frozen into 2 vials-> 1ml of stemcell banker, 5*E6 cells per vial.
